title: CustomKits
description: CustomKits is a powerful and flexible plugin for Paper/Spigot 1.16.5 servers that allows administrators and players to create, customize, and issue unique sets of items (whales) with advanced management capabilities.
body:
**CustomKits is a powerful and flexible plug—in for Paper/Spigot 1.16.5 servers that allows administrators and players to create, customize, and issue unique sets of items (whales) with advanced management capabilities.**

**What does CustomKits add?**

Flexible Whale system: Create whales directly from the player's inventory with one command. Each set can contain any items, enchantments, and customizations.

Access control: A unique permission is automatically created for each whale (ck.kit.<name>), which allows you to flexibly configure who and which whales can receive.

Cooldowns and limits: Set individual cooldowns (waiting time between takeaways) and the maximum number of uses for each whale.

Hiding and giving away on first login: You can hide a whale from the list or automatically give it to new players on the first login to the server.

Custom messages: Configure whale receipt messages, errors, limits, etc. via a separate messages.yml file.

**Convenient commands:**

/ck create <name> [display name] — create a new whale from the inventory
/kit <name> — get a kit for yourself
/ck give <name> <player> — give the whale to another player
/ck list — list of all available whales
/ck setcooldown <name> <seconds> — set cooldown
/ck delete <name> — delete kit
/ck reload — restart config

**Rights:**

ck.kit.<name> — the right to receive a specific whale
customkits.create — create and configure customkits whales
.give — giving whales to other players
customkits.list — viewing the list of whales
customkits.delete — deleting whales
customkits.reload — reloading the config

Auto-completion and search: Commands support auto-completion and are case and space insensitive.

Duplicate protection: You cannot create a whale with an existing name.

**Why choose CustomKits?**

Maximum customization: All parameters are easily configured via YAML files, without restarting the server.

Compatibility: Works on Paper/Spigot 1.16.5, does not conflict with Essentials, GreatKits and other plug-ins on whales.

Simplicity for players: You can get the right set with one team, without unnecessary difficulties.

Easy localization: All messages are placed in a separate file and are easily translated.

Who is this plugin for?

For servers where individual customization of kits for donors, beginners, events, etc. is important.

For administrators who need to quickly create and manage sets without manually editing files.

For players who need a user-friendly and intuitive interface for getting whales.
**_
CustomKits is your universal tool for managing sets of items on the Minecraft server!_**
